auth.googleDescription: Use your Google account to access the web workspace and sync recordings against the live backend.
auth.googleRequiredError: Gravador access is restricted to Google Auth.
auth.googleGenericError: Google authentication could not be completed right now.
auth.googlePopupClosed: The authentication window was closed before completion.
auth.googlePopupBlocked: The browser blocked the Google popup. We will try redirecting automatically.
auth.googleUnauthorizedDomain: The current domain is not yet authorized in Firebase Auth for Google sign-in.
auth.googleOperationNotAllowed: The Google provider is not enabled in this Firebase Authentication project.
auth.googleSessionError: Google sign-in returned, but the server could not create the Gravador session.
auth.mobileGoogleSubtitle: Use the same Google account as the web workspace to record and sync on this device.
auth.mobileGoogleHint: This build uses Firebase Google authentication and requires the public Expo client IDs to be configured.
auth.mobileGoogleConfigError: Google Sign-In is not configured for this mobile build yet.
auth.mobileGoogleError: Google sign-in could not be completed on this device.
auth.mobileGoogleCancelled: Google sign-in was canceled before completion.

landing.eyebrow: Android test build + live web workspace
landing.description: Capture from your phone, process with AI, and keep transcript, summary, action items, mind map, and chat synced in a web workspace that is already live.
landing.mobileStatus: Android internal distribution is the current priority. The website is now the handoff point for install and validation.
landing.captureBody: Start quickly on mobile, keep recording in the background, and sync later without losing the session.
landing.aiBody: Summaries, action items, chapters, quotes, and mind maps are generated from every recording.
landing.syncBody: Open the same recording on the web workspace to search, share, reprocess, and keep working with your team.

download.title: Download and test Gravador
download.description: Install the current Android preview build, or keep using the live web workspace while mobile distribution is being expanded.
download.androidReadyBody: The latest internal Android APK is ready for validation against the live backend.
download.androidPendingBody: The download slot is ready, but the latest Android APK has not been published to the site yet.
download.androidInstallHint: Because this is an internal APK, Android may ask you to allow installation from unknown sources.
download.webTitle: Use the live web app now
download.webBody: If you only need immediate access, sign in with your Google account and continue in the browser while the mobile build is validated.
download.docsBody: Need the release workflow, deploy runbook, or self-hosting notes? The docs route is now public and live.
download.iosBody: iOS and TestFlight stay in the next release phase because Apple credentials were not part of today's confirmed access.

docs.title: Docs and release references
docs.description: Public access to the operational references, deployment runbooks, and self-host material that back the live web and mobile rollout.
docs.deployBody: Cloud Run, Firebase Hosting, mobile preview, and required environment configuration.
docs.selfHostBody: Docker-based local and self-host setup for running the stack outside managed cloud.
docs.creditsBody: Open-source references, inspirations, and upstream projects used by Gravador.
docs.repoBody: Source code, issue tracking, and release history on GitHub.

recorder.offline: You're offline — we'll upload when you're back
recorder.background: Recording continues while your screen is off

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.notFound: We couldn't find what you're looking for.
errors.unauthorized: You need to sign in to continue.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Account and preferences
settings.description: Configure AI providers, choose models for each agent, and manage your account.

providers.title: AI Provider
providers.description: Select the provider and enter your API key. For OpenRouter, a single key gives access to hundreds of models.
providers.openrouter: Universal gateway — 300+ models, one API key

catalog.title: Model Catalog
catalog.empty: No models found. Check the provider API key.

agents.title: Models per Agent
agents.description: Each agent/pipeline can use a different model. If no model is chosen, the agent uses the workspace default model.
agents.unavailableMessage: The model {model} is no longer available in the catalog. Select another model.
agents.summarizeDesc: TL;DR, bullet points and long summary

security.title: Security
security.sessionSeparation: Server session separate from client token.
security.keysEncrypted: API keys encrypted at rest, never exposed to frontend after saving.
security.healthCheck: Production infrastructure validated with real health check.

recording.transcriptPending: The transcript will appear here when processing finishes
recording.speaker: Speaker
recording.noAudio: Audio is not available for playback yet
recording.askQuestion: Ask a question about this recording

share.expired: This link has expired or was revoked
share.publicNotice: Public sharing — content is restricted to what the creator allowed
